preregistration.pooling_rule: unweighted mean of layer-28 hidden vectors over snapshot positions j <= k
preregistration.surface_scores: unchanged matched-horizon text@k prediction files from pred_dir
preregistration.training_rule: fit on train split only; validation used for reporting and cross-source score normalization only
preregistration.combined_source_normalization: source=pooled rows z-score hidden and surface arms per source using validation-split aligned rows before concatenation
preregistration.success_rule: full success iff k=8 delta CI low >= 0, max adjacent hidden AUROC drop <= monotone_tolerance, and k=64 delta CI upper >= 0
preregistration.partial_rule: if k=8 holds but k=64 CI is fully negative, pivot to lead-time primary and stop equal-horizon variants
preregistration.failure_rule: if k=8 CI low < 0, stop; A1 was score-pooling-specific

success_preview.decision_rule: full success iff k=8 delta CI low >= 0, max adjacent hidden AUROC drop <= monotone_tolerance, and k=64 delta CI upper >= 0

limitations: A2 is the final pre-declared equal-horizon probe attempt; no layer or model-family reselection is performed.
Cross-source pooled rows use validation z-normalization for both arms before concatenation.
The script reads hidden activations plus metadata ids/labels only, and reuses existing text prediction files for surface scores.
